days.text: Cloudy apart from sunny intervals. Force 3 to 5 southerly winds with gusts.
Cloudy apart from sunny intervals. One or two showers. Force 3 to 4 southerly winds, occasionally force 5 with gusts.
Cloudy apart from sunny intervals. One or two showers. Force 3 to 4 southerly winds.
Cloudy apart from sunny periods. Force 3 to 4 southerly winds.
Cloudy apart from sunny periods. Force 2 to 4 south to southeasterly winds.
